response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling teams beyond 10 people — critical gaps for a CTO role in regulated AI-driven fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Exposure to agentic AI workflows via MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven experience with event-driven systems and real-time infrastructure (DLang, microservices)
Strong open-source leadership and technical communication via GISCollective and workshops
concerns: No evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in financial or regulated environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
Minimal indication of fintech domain expertise (credit risk, working capital, compliance infrastructure)
